subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Upon thee be the peace of God and His mercy. Praise be unto God that thou hast turned thyself and hast hearkened with thine own ear to the Call of the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک سلام الله و رحمته الحمد لله توجه نمودی و ندای مظلوم را باذن خود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
